external_constants.name: SLACK_RESPONSE_STYLE_PROMPT
external_constants.value_preview: <slack_response_style> You are responding in a Slack thread, not the PostHog web app. Slack readers want short, skimmabl…

test_oracles.condition: context is active (per focused PR test)
test_oracles.expectation: combined output includes 'responding in a Slack thread'

test_oracles.condition: context is inactive (per focused PR test)
test_oracles.expectation: combined output must not include 'responding in a Slack thread'

test_oracles.condition: parameterized cases distinguish active vs inactive context
test_oracles.expectation: return value is non-empty iff context is active
